columns.name: ordrre12
columns.description: 12-character reference for the order

columns.name: distravd
columns.description: Code representing distribution area or branch

columns.name: kundennr
columns.description: Unique identifier for the customer

columns.name: ordreklsig
columns.description: Indicates the status of the order (e.g., 'C' - Cancelled, 'O' - Open)

columns.name: sendesprikt
columns.description: Indicates shipping instructions or preferences

columns.name: onsketlevdattod
columns.description: The date when the order is expected to be delivered

columns.name: ordredatet
columns.description: The date on which the order was placed

columns.name: fklevnr
columns.description: Unique identifier for the supplier

columns.name: inkkjoper
columns.description: Code representing the party responsible for invoicing

columns.name: referanse
columns.description: External reference number for the order

columns.name: vmnr
columns.description: Numeric version or revision number of the order

columns.name: varemottaker
columns.description: Name or identifier of the person receiving the goods

columns.name: vmadresse1
columns.description: First line of the delivery address

columns.name: vmadresse2
columns.description: Second line of the delivery address

columns.name: vmpostnr
columns.description: Postal code for the delivery address

columns.name: vmpoststed
columns.description: City or town of the delivery address

columns.name: samlet
columns.description: Total amount for the order (if applicable)

columns.name: pakkingsign
columns.description: Indicates whether the item is packed or unpacked

columns.name: eanlokasjon
columns.description: Unique EAN location code for inventory management

columns.name: eanavsender
columns.description: EAN code of the sender or manufacturer

columns.name: valutakode
columns.description: ISO 4217 currency code for transactions in this order

columns.name: sendestekst
columns.description: Additional text or instructions related to shipping

columns.name: levbet
columns.description: Indicates the type of delivery date (e.g., 'D' - Delivery, 'P' - Pickup)

columns.name: levbettekst
columns.description: Additional text or instructions related to the delivery date

columns.name: transporttype
columns.description: Indicates the type of transport used for shipping (e.g., 'L' - Local, 'N' - National)

columns.name: hmerknad
columns.description: Any additional remarks or notes related to the order

columns.name: fkavd
columns.description: Number representing a specific distribution area or branch

columns.name: fkaordrenr
columns.description: Sequence number for the order line within the order header

columns.name: fkatidspunkt
columns.description: The exact time when the order or line item was created/modified

columns.name: selgerid
columns.description: Identifier for the salesperson responsible for this order
